title: The Admiral's List: Jimas Veltraa Memorial Edition
content:
{{Top|rwm|old}}
'''The Admiral's List: Jimas Veltraa Memorial Edition''' was the edition of ''[[The Admiral's List]]'' that was included with [[Knights of the Old Republic 13|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 13]].
